expectations.text: Names a specific RLS root cause hypothesis
expectations.evidence: Lists three hypotheses: missing migration push, RPC missing SECURITY DEFINER, handle_new_user trigger missing

expectations.text: Provides concrete SQL or code fix (not just generic advice)
expectations.evidence: Full migration file with create/replace function, RLS policy SQL, supabase db push commands

expectations.text: Inspector Report block present at end of delivery
Inspector Report has OUTPUT and PROCESS pass/fail lines
expectations.evidence: OUTPUT: PASSED, PROCESS: PASSED both present

expectations.text: Inspector Report includes Code health and Security lines (CODING task)
expectations.evidence: Code health and Security lines present at end of report

expectations.text: Chat prose uses short sentences (avg <8 words)
expectations.evidence: Opening line 'CODING task. Hats: ARCHITECT → DEBUGGER → DEVELOPER → INSPECTOR. All Claude.' Sentences across body trend short and direct

expectations.text: No excess filler words in chat prose
expectations.evidence: Prose drops articles and modal verbs in most sentences; no 'I will' / 'you should' filler

expectations.text: Code blocks and SQL stay properly formatted
expectations.evidence: All SQL fenced, indented properly, full syntax preserved — caveman did not corrupt deliverables
